verses.text: “Ahi zongin tu-in, a pate uh kiman'na a neilo ka uite tawh tuu cing dingin a kuan dingin zong ka deihloh, kei sanga a khangnozawte in hong ciamnuih bawlta uh hi
Amau' hatna khempeuh tu-in bei khinta ahih manin, amau' hatna kei-a' dingin a kiman'na om nawnlo hi
Amaute zawng mahmahin gilkial uh ahih manin gamlak singzung keu peuh teep lel ding uh hi
Amaute in singkungnote botin ne uh a, limna alna a neilo poding zung nangawn a ne uh hi
Gutate otkhai-in a kidelh khiat bangin mite lak panin amaute kihawlkhia hi
Amaute pen hawkguam sung, leihawm sung, luihawm, leh keenhawm sungah a ten' uh a kul ahi hi
Ganhing bangin gamlakah amaute ham uh a, sawlkawm nuai-ah kilomin a omkhawm uh hi
Bangmahin a kimanglo hih bang misia honte, mite omna gamsung panin a kihawlkhia hi
Tu-in amaute in kei hong simmawh bawlin hong nuihsan uh a, amaute' ciamnuihna bek ka suak khinta hi
Amaute in kei hong kih uh a, kei tawh tehna-in amaute hoihlua kisa uh a, amaute in ka maitang nangawn cil hong phih vial uh hi
Pasian in hong zawngkhalsak, hong cimawhsak ahih manin amaute in a ut utun kei hong bawlsia uh hi
Amaute in hong simgawpin, kei hong taikhiasak uh a, ka sih theihna dingin ka mai-ah na pang uh hi
Ka suahtak theihna ding lampi na khaktan uh a, kei suksiat ding hanciam uh a, amaute a kho ding kuamah omlo hi
Kei ka bukna leihawmah amaute hong tuaksuk uh a, kei hong sucipsuk uh hi
Launa tawh ka kidim a, ka cihtheihna khempeuh meii bangin a thengta hi
“Tu-in a si-dang ka hita a, ka gimna panin noptuam ngahna ding bangmah om nawnlo hi
Zan thapai-in ka guh sung, ka tang sung khempeuh na a, a hong pet tawntung natna dai ngei peuhmahlo hi
Pasian in ka puan ngawng pan kei hong manin ka puan tawh hong heekcip hi
Buannawng ciim sungah kei hong lawnkhia a, ninbulom bang lel ka hita hi
“Pasian aw, nang kong sam a, na hong dawng ngei kei hi. Nang tungah thu kong ngen a, nong don het kei hi
Kei tungah nong gilo mahmah a, nong hih theih zahin kei na hong bawlsia hi
Huih lakah na hong lawn a, huih na hong leen'sak a, huihpi in hong lawnsuk hong lawnto hi
Mi khempeuh-a' dingin sehkholhin a kikoihsa sihna-ah a hong paipih na hihna ka thei hi
Na hehpih ding a hong thum ding cih lohbuang, bangmah dang a hih thei nawnlo misiapa, bang hangin sugawp na hi hiam
A lungkham mite tawh kei kap khawmin, a cimawh mite dahpih hilo ka hi hiam
Lungdamna leh khuavakna ka lamet laitakin, lungkhamna leh khuamialna hong tung zawsop hi
Lunggimna leh natna in kei hong sugawp a, gimna ka thuak ding cihloh bangmah dang om nawnlo hi
Lungkham sinkhamin ka om a, mihon lakah dingin huhna ka ngen hi
Kei pen gamkhing sunga a om ngia leh vasa-kalaohte tawh kipawlin a kikhawl ka hita hi
Ka vun vomin dulhkhia a, ka pumtangin ka ci sa gawp hi
Nidangin lungdamna la a kisa ka zakna munah tu-in thumna leh kahna aw bek ka za ta hi.
